allow: Bash(PORT=3001 node -e " const http = require\('http'\); const { spawn } = require\('child_process'\); const server = spawn\('node', ['server.js'], { cwd: '/Users/andrea/stargazing', env: { ...process.env, PORT: '3001' } }\); let output = ''; server.stdout.on\('data', d => output += d\); server.stderr.on\('data', d => output += d\); setTimeout\(\(\) => { http.get\('http://localhost:3001', res => { let body = ''; res.on\('data', d => body += d\); res.on\('end', \(\) => { console.log\('Status:', res.statusCode\); console.log\('Body length:', body.length\); console.log\('Has Stargazing:', body.includes\('Stargazing'\)\); console.log\('Has hero:', body.includes\('hero-title'\)\); console.log\('Has nav:', body.includes\('nav-links'\)\); console.log\('Has Mission Log:', body.includes\('Mission Log'\)\); console.log\('Server output:', output.trim\(\)\); // Test other pages const pages = ['/music', '/shows', '/gallery', '/about']; let done = 0; pages.forEach\(p => { http.get\('http://localhost:3001' + p, r => { let b = ''; r.on\('data', d => b += d\); r.on\('end', \(\) => { console.log\(p + ':', r.statusCode, 'len=' + b.length\); done++; if \(done === pages.length\) server.kill\(\); }\); }\); }\); }\); }\); }, 2000\); ")
